signals.summary: OPEC discipline offsets slower industrial demand.
Storage surplus has narrowed after hotter weather revisions.
Asia procurement and European refill demand support contracted LNG exporters.
Crack spreads remain volatile and debt markets penalize watchlisted refiners.
Rate-cut expectations help contracted renewables, but project execution still matters.

stale_data_warning: Desk worksheets dated before 2026-05-15 should be reconciled to this service before portfolio decisions.
